message:
fix(actor,gen_server): wake cancel_waker on abort and return proper join futures

src/actor.rs:
- Fix ActorHandle::abort() to wake the cancel_waker after setting
  cancel_requested and fast_cancel, ensuring the actor loop sees the
  cancellation promptly instead of waiting for the next poll
- Refactor join() to properly scope the write guard release before
  waking, preventing potential deadlock if the waker triggers a re-entry
- Add drop-abort regression test covering ActorJoinFuture drop path

src/gen_server.rs:
- Apply the same cancel_waker wake fix to GenServerHandle::abort()
- Scope the write guard identically to actor.rs for consistency
- Add drop-abort regression test for GenServerJoinFuture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
